inputs.shares_source: 333,734,176 weighted-average basic shares Q3 FY2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 net cash from operating activities $245.9M divided by ~334M current shares ($0.74/sh raw); Lawrence base uses $0.85/sh after modest normalization for bitcoin working-capital swings and before crediting Q3 FY2026 fair-value gains on assets held for sale (10-K FY2025 MD&A; 10-Q Q3 FY2026)
inputs.hashrate_source: Installed hashrate capacity ~40.1 EH/s and ~650 MW operating data center capacity at June 30, 2025 (10-K FY2025 Item 1)
inputs.microsoft_contract_source: Partner Statement of Work dated November 2, 2025: ~$9.7B through 2031 for GPU infrastructure at Childress Horizon 1-4 (~200 MW IT load, NVIDIA GB300) (8-K 2025-11-03)
inputs.nvidia_contract_source: Managed services AI cloud contract referenced in 8-K 2026-05-19 ($3.4B; Dell GPU purchase ~$1.6B to support deployment)
inputs.dell_capex_source: ~$5.8B Dell purchase agreement November 2, 2025 plus ~$1.6B May 19, 2026 GPU procurement (8-K filings)
inputs.convert_proceeds_source: Proceeds from convertible debt $3,299.6M nine months ended March 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026 cash flow statement)
inputs.impairment_source: Impairment of long-lived assets held for use $188.4M nine months ended March 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)
inputs.rpo_source: Revenue remaining performance obligation $710.3M plus contract disclosures $9.7B Microsoft and $3.4B NVIDIA (10-Q Q3 FY2026)
inputs.normalization_note: Bitcoin mining plus early AI cloud services. Q3 FY2026 GAAP net income ($247.8M in the quarter) includes fair-value adjustments and asset-sale gains not treated as run-rate owner cash. Lawrence base excludes Microsoft/NVIDIA contract NPV and GPU capex stack from starting owner cash; those are sized in ai_overlay and segment options.

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 filing-based operating cash path; no third-party blend

blended_best.notes: Marvin floor only; no approved third-party blend

bear.notes: Hashprice compression; GPU delivery delays; Microsoft/NVIDIA contract slippage; convert dilution

base.notes: Mining cash flat-to-modest; partial AI cloud ramp from contracted backlog; excludes full $9.7B Microsoft NPV in Lawrence FCF path

bull.notes: Horizon GPU tranches on time; AI cloud ARR scales; mining margin holds at 40+ EH/s

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Microsoft GPU tranche energization schedule and service-fee margin
NVIDIA managed-services AI cloud revenue recognition path
Dell GPU delivery timing versus $7.4B purchase stack
Convertible debt conversion dilution at current share price

capex_stress_2026.notes: Illustrative trough if Dell/Microsoft GPU capex front-loads before service fees — not Lawrence starting cash flow

ai_inflection_bull.fcf_y0_note: Partial conversion of contracted GPU backlog to owner cash [Assumption]

segments.label: Bitcoin mining (renewable-powered)
segments.evidence: FY2025 revenue $484.6M primarily mining; ~40.1 EH/s at June 30, 2025 (10-K FY2025)

segments.label: AI cloud services (existing fleet)
segments.evidence: AI Cloud Services revenue segment in 10-Q Q3 FY2026; early HPC/AI services revenue alongside mining

options.label: Microsoft GPU infrastructure contract (~$9.7B through 2031)
options.base_terminal_rationale: P_base ~25% of undiscounted contract value net of Dell capex and execution risk — not in Lawrence FCF0
options.evidence: 8-K 2025-11-03 Microsoft Agreement; RPO disclosure $9.7B (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

options.label: NVIDIA managed-services AI cloud ($3.4B)
options.base_terminal_rationale: P_base ~25% of contract value pending GPU deployment — context tier until 10-K exhibits filed
options.evidence: 8-K 2026-05-19 Dell Purchase Agreement supporting $3.4B NVIDIA contract

options.label: Dell GPU purchase obligations (~$7.4B)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Capex and financing drag burdened in corporate/segment paths; not separate positive terminal
options.evidence: 8-K 2025-11-03 and 2026-05-19 Dell agreements; convert proceeds $3.3B 9M FY2026 (10-Q)

corporate_drag.notes: Stock-based compensation, integration G&A, and impairment noise ($188M 9M FY2026) net of interest income on cash

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Power sites and energized MW at Childress/Sweetwater carry strategic value beyond depreciated miner book; cash $2.2B Mar 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / pipeline?
option_scan.evidence: Horizon 1-4 GPU campus (~200 MW IT load) under Microsoft contract; expansion MW not yet in revenue (8-K 2025-11-03)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Impairment $188M 9M FY2026; induced convert expense $112M (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Microsoft $9.7B and NVIDIA $3.4B contract values disclosed; $710M short-term RPO (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material hidden equity stakes (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: AI cloud services revenue growing within consolidated segment table (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

growth_explanation.mechanism: Base Lawrence growth assumes modest mining cash stability plus AI cloud services ramp from existing fleet; Microsoft/NVIDIA contracted GPU capacity is modeled as probability-weighted options, not full RPO in starting owner cash.
growth_explanation.stress_test: If GPU tranches slip 12 months or Dell capex overruns, owner cash growth falls to bear scenario (-5% years 1-5).

theory_implied.derivation: segment_build owner-cash weighted blend (growth only; exit from scenarios.base)

overlay_results.notes: Partial conversion of contracted GPU backlog to owner cash [Assumption]

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Operating-only fallback. Add an explicit component_valuation schedule before drawing asset-level conclusions.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_groups.label: Operating business (fallback)
component_groups.adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.

valuation_proof.adjustment: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.label: Operating business (fallback)

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

blockers: A complete, explicit ownership/component schedule has not been supplied.

falsifiers: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence envelope)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
